features: ECO-FRIENDLY: Our drinks coasters is made from high-quality cork, a natural and sustainable material. By choosing these coasters, you are making an environmentally responsible choice while protecting your furniture.

SUPERIOR PROTECTION: These cork coasters provide excellent protection for your tabletops and surfaces. The natural cork material is absorbent, preventing condensation and spills from damaging your furniture, while also providing a soft and non-slip surface for your drinks.

STYLISH & VERSATILE: With their sleek and minimalist design, our cork coasters effortlessly blend with any decor. Whether you have a modern or traditional style, these coasters will enhance the visual appeal of your space while providing a functional solution to keep your surfaces safe.

DURABLE & LONG LASTING: Crafted from premium cork, these coasters are built to last. The sturdy construction ensures that they will withstand daily use and retain their shape and effectiveness over time. Enjoy a reliable and durable solution for protecting your furniture from stains, heat, and scratches.

CONVENIENT & EASY TO CLEAN: Our cork coasters are hassle-free when it comes to maintenance. Simply wipe them with a damp cloth or rinse them under running water to remove any stains or spills. Lightweight and stackable, they are also easy to store when not in use, making them a practical addition to your home or office.
